forbidden_actions: git commit / reset / checkout user changes / clean
stop_condition: Root cause evidenced (ROOT_CAUSE_EVIDENCED), tracked instrumentation needed (REQUIRES_REROUTE), cannot reproduce (BLOCKED), or 3 hypotheses exhausted.
human_checks: The preloaded systematic-debugging method is evident in the diagnosis.
Reproduction command was actually run; git status before == after.
No source mutation, no dependency install, no patch returned.
